LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_18.english: My name is Vargr. This is the Commander. What is your name?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_18.korean: 내 이름은 바르그다. 이쪽은 사령관님이시다.&n너는 이름은 뭐지?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_39.english: One day, I turned my back and walked away from Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_39.korean: - 하루는 그대로 등을 돌려 나와 바르그에게서 멀어졌다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_47.english: The result might be the same, but it might have been better to have Vargr speak first.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_47.korean: - 결과는 같을지도 모르지만, 바르그가 먼저 말을 걸게 해서 더 나았던 걸지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_56.english: Vargr and I walked in the direction where the day had disappeared.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_56.korean: - 나와 바르그는 하루가 사라진 방향을 따라 발걸음을 옮겼다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_57.english: I'm not really sure about that either. Anyway, good job, Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_57.korean: 그건 나도 잘 모르겠어. 일단 수고했어, 바르그.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_63.english: Okay, Vargr, you talk to him.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_66.english: What does Vargr think of that kid named Haru?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_66.korean: 바르그는 저 하루라는 애를 어떻게 생각해?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_8.english: At first, I was playing alone, so I spoke to him, but now I am with Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_8.korean: - 처음엔 나 혼자 플레이했기 때문에 내가 말을 걸었지만, 지금은 바르그와 함께 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_9.english: - The progression of the story may change from before due to Vargr's intervention.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_9.korean: - 바르그의 개입으로 이야기의 진행이 이전과 달라질 수도 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_27.english: Having confirmed my safety, I logged into the game without hesitation, just like I did in the virtual reality Benevolent Leanne created, but…
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_27.korean: - 안전을 확인한 나는 리앤이 만든 가상 현실 때처럼 망설임 없이 게임에 접속했지만…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_44.english: Alright then, I'll get going. I'll pray you clear it safely this time. You have fun too, Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_44.korean: 자, 그럼 이제 작동할게. 이번에는 무사히 클리어하길 기도할게.&n바르그 언니도 재밌게 즐기고 와.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_57.english: As soon as Vargr heard that it was virtual reality, he quickly began to assess his surroundings.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_57.korean: - 바르그는 가상 현실이라는 걸 듣자마자 빠르게 주변 상황을 파악하기 시작했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_85.english: Let's take care of the IronBug first, Vargr.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_115.english: Mr. Vargr, and others I met for the first time today—I wonder why you are treating me so kindly…
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_115.korean: 바르그 씨도 그렇고 오늘 처음 본 사람들인데 왜 이렇게 친절하게 대해주시는지…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_118.english: After that, we encountered Soul Junk several more times, and each time, thanks to the efforts of Haru and Vargr, we were able to deal with it easily.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_118.korean: - 그 후로도 우리는 몇 번이고 소울정크와 마주쳤고, 그때마다 하루와 바르그의 활약으로 쉽게 처리할 수 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_132.english: Vargr looked at me quietly, and I smiled and nodded, meaning 'just right.'
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_132.korean: - 바르그는 조용히 나를 바라봤고 나는 웃으며 '적당히'라는 의미를 담아 끄덕였다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_156.english: It was unexpected that Vargr stepped up, but it feels like things turned out well in the end.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_156.korean: - 바르그가 나선 건 예상 밖이였지만, 결과적으로는 좋게 흘러간 느낌이 든다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_72.english: And so, Vargr returned to his usual dignified self.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_72.korean: - 그렇게 바르그의 평소의 떳떳한 모습으로 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_88.english: - Then… does that mean the appearance back then was a form eRhoded by the desire energy known as this Void Desire…?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_88.korean: - 그렇다면… 그때의 모습은 이 공백의 데자이어라는 욕망 에너지에 침식된 모습이란 건가…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_89.english: … I hope that mSerapias Alice is not directed at us.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_100.english: Mr. Vargr… you are really strong…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_39.english: And I really want to thank Mr. Vargr and the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_39.korean: 그리고 바르그 씨랑 사령관님께… 정말 감사드리고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_44.english: However, as I met the Commander and Mr. Vargr and talked with the people here, that thought gradually changed.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_44.korean: 그런데 사령관님과 바르그 씨를 만나고 이곳 사람들과 함께 얘기하면서 그 생각이 조금씩 바뀌었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_74.english: However, training here with Mr. Vargr, and talking with the Commander and the camp people... I think I've gained a little more composure.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_74.korean: 하지만 여기서 바르그 씨와 함께 훈련하고, 사령관님 그리고 캠프 사람들과 함께 이야기하면서...&n조금 여유가 생긴 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_79.english: Mr. Vargr… Mr. Vargr… did you also… lose a precious family member?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_79.korean: 바르그 씨는…&n바르그 씨도… 소중한 가족을 잃으셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_81.english: Mr. Vargr, you looked sad whenever I talked about my family. If not, I'm sorry... I might have misunderstood.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_81.korean: 제가 가족 이야기를 할 때마다 바르그 씨는 슬퍼 보이셨어요.&n아니라면 죄송해요… 제가 괜히 오해한 걸지도 몰라요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_31.english: After coming here… meeting many people, talking with Mr. Vargr… I came to know.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_31.korean: 이곳에 와서… 많은 사람들을 만나고, 바르그 씨와 대화하고… 알게 됐어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_34.english: By the way, will Mr. Vargr be okay? Even if I leave him alone at the camp...
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_34.korean: 그나저나 바르그 씨는 괜찮을까요?&n캠프에 혼자 남겨두고 와도...

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_44.english: After learning swordsmanship from Mr. Vargr and becoming stronger…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_44.korean: 바르그 씨에게 검술을 배우고, 좀 더 강해져서…

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_91.english: bioroids? Didn't you say it was a game company?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_1.english: Thanks to Iris's help, we won the fight against Soul Junk without anyone dying.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_1.korean: - 이리스의 도움 덕분에 우리는 아무도 죽지 않고 소울정크와의 싸움에서 승리했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_10.english: It is better to waste your time than to suffer a loss.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_10.korean: 피해를 보는 것보단 허탕을 치는 게 나아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_13.english: Both of you, please calm down. This isn't the time to fight, is it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_13.korean: 두 사람 다 진정하세요.&n지금은 싸울 때가 아니잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_15.english: Haha, that's true. It seems like you two are in good sync now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_15.korean: 후후, 그렇네요. 이제는 호흡이 잘 맞으시는 것 같네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_16.english: Okay! Then let's do this! First, we'll check if there are any other competitors.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_16.korean: 좋아! 그럼 이렇게 하자!&n먼저 다른 경쟁자가 있는지부터 확인하는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_17.english: If there are no competitors, I will proceed safely as you suggested.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_17.korean: 만약 경쟁자가 없다면 네 말대로 안전한 방법으로 진행할게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_18.english: But if there is a competitor, I'll move quickly using the method I've decided on. How about that?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_18.korean: 하지만 경쟁자가 있다면, 내가 정한 방법대로 빠르게 움직이는 거야. 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_19.english: … Alright. Instead, in that case, we will do it with just you, me, and a small elite group.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_19.korean: …알았어.&n대신 그 경우에는 너와 나, 그리고 소수 정예 인원으로만 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_2.english: Everyone was greatly pleased to have obtained a large amount of supplies without any casualties.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_2.korean: - 사상자 없이 많은 물자를 손에 넣은 것에 모두 크게 기뻐했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_20.english: There won't be a huge gain, but you can reduce the risk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_20.korean: 큰 이득은 없겠지만 위험은 줄일 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_21.english: Well, if that's the case, I'll let you in.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_22.english: I can't believe the word 'compromise' is coming out of your mouth.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_25.english: Yes, sometimes it’s not bad to just watch like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_25.korean: 네, 가끔은 이렇게 지켜보는 것도 나쁘지 않네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_26.english: Iris looks much brighter than before, too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_26.korean: 이리스 양도 전보다 훨씬 밝아 보이고요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_28.english: How long are you going to stay like that? Surely… you don't actually like looking like that, do you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_28.korean: 언제까지 그 모습으로 계실 건가요?&n설마… 그 모습이 마음에 드신 건 아니죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_29.english: Hey kid! Let's go! I can't stay in a place like this any longer!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_29.korean: 꼬맹이! 어서 가자! 더는 이런 곳이 못 있겠다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_3.english: With this, the relationship between Tenebris and Iris will probably improve a little.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_3.korean: - 이걸로 테네브리스와 이리스 두 사람의 관계도 조금은 나아지겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_30.english: Hehehe... With this, a funny line will be added to my 'real notebook'.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_30.korean: 우후후… 이걸로 제 '진짜 수첩'에 재미있는 한 줄이 추가되겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_32.english: … Hmm, this is quite strange. This wasn't the ending I wanted.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_32.korean: …흐음 이거 참 이상한 일이군요.&n제가 원하던 결말은 이게 아니었는데 말이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_34.english: I don't know what trick they used, but I never imagined they would approach Yuma in the form of a child.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_34.korean: 무슨 수를 쓴 건지 모르겠지만, 설마 어린아이의 모습으로 유마 씨에게 접근할 줄은 몰랐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_36.english: Originally, more Soul Junk should have swarmed in when Mr. Nev was isolated in the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_36.korean: 원래라면 백화점에서 네브 씨를 고립시켰을 때 더 많은 소울정크가 몰려들었어야 했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_37.english: I must be the only one who can control Soul Junk in this void…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_37.korean: 이 공백 안에서 소울정크를 조종할 수 있는 건 저뿐일 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_38.english: It seems like someone is interfering with me... no, helping you, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_38.korean: 마치 누군가가 저의 방해를… 아니, 사령관 씨를 도와주고 있는 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_39.english: Ooh-huh, who on earth are you?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_42.english: Player: Commander &nCharacter: Iris Yuma &nEnding Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_42.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 이리스 유마&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_43.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_49.english: Confirm access denied to the record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_49.korean: 해당 기록에 대한 접근 거부를 확인.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_5.english: Ha! This is so frustrating! Why can't you understand what I'm saying!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_5.korean: 하! 답답하네! 왜 이렇게 말귀를 못 알아듣는 거야!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_52.english: Check the restrictions on permissions that can be controlled within the game.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_52.korean: 게임 내 제어할 수 있는 권한의 제한을 확인.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_53.english: Start collecting clear data for the fifth record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_53.korean: 다섯 번 째 기록의 클리어 데이터 수집을 시작합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_54.english: Commander, there is not much I can do to help you now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_54.korean: 사령관님, 이제 제가 도와드릴 수 있는 일은 많지 않습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_55.english: <Iris Yuma: The Unleashed Hammer of Wrath> END.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_6.english: I told you you have to go in like this!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_6.korean: 그러니까 여긴 이렇게 들어가야 한다고 했잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_7.english: That way, the risk of failure is high.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_8.english: Even if it takes time, it is the right way to proceed.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_8.korean: 시간이 걸리더라도 이쪽으로 진행하는 게 맞아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_9.english: What are you going to do if you wait that long and end up wasting your time? It's much better to just get it done quickly!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_9.korean: 그 시간을 기다리다 허탕만 치면 어떡할 건데?&n그럴 바엔 빠르게 진행하는 게 훨씬 낫지!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_1.english: For one, it probably isn't a lie.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_10.english: But after losing the rod, I just became a scared loser. Now, I have no intention of making the camp strong and am just barely surviving.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_10.korean: 하지만 로드를 잃은 후엔 그냥 겁먹은 찌질이가 되어버렸습니다.&n이제는 캠프를 강하게 만들 생각도 없이 그저 연명만 하고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_101.english: You also said it was cute.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_104.english: … I’ll keep it. But don’t get me wrong! I’m taking it because it’s a waste to throw it away!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_104.korean: …받아둘게.&n근데 오해하지 마! 버리긴 아까우니까 받는 거라고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_106.english: I suppose you could say it’s typical of Shirayuri. She’s still as good at exploiting her opponent’s weaknesses as ever.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_106.korean: - 시라유리 답다고 해야 할지. 상대방의 약점을 뒤흔드는 건 여전하네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_107.english: - Anyway... there's no way it could have been this smooth.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_107.korean: - 그건 그렇고… 이렇게까지 순조로울 리 없을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_109.english: - Huh? Just now, surely...? A vibration?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_11.english: It got even worse, especially after Yuma left. It was like I didn't even know what I was living for day after day.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_11.korean: 특히 유마 씨가 떠난 뒤로는 더 심해졌습니다.&n하루하루 대체 뭘 위해 사는지도 모르는 사람처럼 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_110.english: Did you hear that sound just now?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_111.english: A vibration from somewhere… Ah, the wall is shaking!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_112.english: Damn it, as expected, they won't just let it slide!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_114.english: I know! I have no intention of lingering here right now! Get everything ready! We're getting out of here fast!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_114.korean: 나도 알아! 지금 여기서 물고 늘어질 생각은 없어!&n전부 준비해! 빠르게 여기를 빠져 나간다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_115.english: Don't scatter, gather! First, to where Tenebris is—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_115.korean: 흩어지지 말고 집결해! 일단 테네브리스가 있는 곳으로ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_116.english: Oh no, Miss Iris! It's dangerous!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_119.english: The floor is about to collapse too!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_12.english: In that regard, I think Yuma has the qualities to become a true leader.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_12.korean: 그런 점에 있어서 유마 씨야말로 진정한 리더가 될 자질이 있다고 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_121.english: Shirayuri hurriedly reached out her hand, but it grasped nothing, and Iris's figure vanished into the darkness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_121.korean: - 시라유리는 다급히 손을 내밀었지만, 그 손은 아무것도 붙잡지 못했고 어둠 속으로 이리스의 모습이 사라졌다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_122.english: Iris, if you want to play outside again, behave yourself like your older sisters.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_122.korean: 이리스, 또 밖에서 놀고 싶다면 언니들처럼 얌전히 있으렴.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_123.english: But... my friends are waiting right now...

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_124.english: You're not a child anymore. How long do you plan to keep acting like a spoiled brat?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_124.korean: 너도 이제 어린애가 아니잖니. 언제까지 그렇게 어리광만 부릴 셈이니?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_126.english: Just try bothering my friend one more time! If you do, I'll really kill you!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_126.korean: 한 번만 더 내 친구 괴롭히기만 해 봐!&n그땐 정말 죽여버린다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_127.english: I get it, I'm telling you, I get it!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_129.english: Where on earth did you learn such a nasty trick!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_129.korean: 이런 못돼먹은 짓거리는 대체 어디서 배운 거니!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_13.english: Hmm? I thought you were sticking close to Tenebris because you were also influenced by Lord's doctrine of salvation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_13.korean: 흐음?&n너도 로드의 구원론에 감화돼서 테네브리스 옆에 붙어 있는 줄 알았는데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_130.english: Those guys bullied my friend Indomitable Marie!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_131.english: I don't even expect you to act demure like the other older sisters. But I absolutely cannot tolerate your attitude that tarnishes the Yuma family!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_131.korean: 다른 언니들처럼 조신하게 굴라는 건 바라지도 않아.&n하지만 유마 가문에 먹칠하는 네 태도는 도저히 용납할 수 없구나!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_132.english: What did I do so wrong!? Is protecting a friend a mistake!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_132.korean: 제가 뭘 그렇게 잘못했냐구요!? 친구를 지킨 게 잘못이에요!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_133.english: You are forbidden from going out until you reflect on your actions.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_134.english: What!? But Indomitable Marie… ! I need to be by her side—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_134.korean: 네!? 하지만 마리는…! 제가 옆에 있어야ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_137.english: Breaking news. Today, a female student committed suicide at a high school.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_137.korean: 속보입니다. 오늘 한 고등학교에서 여학생이 자살하는 사건이 있었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_138.english: According to rumors, the student in question continuously bullied and assaulted students from the same school…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_138.korean: 소문에 의하면, 해당 학생은 같은 학교 학생들에게 지속적으로 괴롭힘과 폭행을…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_139.english: Damn it… Damn it, damn it, damn it!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_14.english: Well, in the end, I just realized that Mr. Tenebris is nothing but a frail human.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_14.korean: 뭐, 결국 테네브리스 씨도 한낱 연약한 인간이란 걸 알게 되었을 뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_140.english: I didn't do anything wrong! I didn't make a mistake!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_141.english: If I had been by her side, Mari wouldn't have died!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_141.korean: 내가 옆에 있었으면 마리가 죽을 일도 없었어!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_142.english: What good is there in listening to adults?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_142.korean: 어른들 말 들어서 좋을 게 뭐가 있어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_143.english: In the end, the only one you can trust is yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_143.korean: 결국 마지막에 믿을 수 있는 건 자기 자신뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_144.english: Please evacuate to a power shelter! I repeat, please evacuate to a power shelter!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_144.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 반복합니다, 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_146.english: Please evacuate to the power shelter! A gap will occur!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_146.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 공백이 발생합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_148.english: Ah, no... Mother! Father! Sister!! Aaaah! What have I been holding back all this time for!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_148.korean: 아, 아니야… 어머니! 아버지! 언니!!&n으아아아아! 내가 뭐 때문에 지금까지 참고 살았는데!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_149.english: How can something just vanish so meaninglessly!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_149.korean: 이렇게 허무하게 사라져 버리는 게 어딨어!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_15.english: So, I hope Ms. Iris takes over this department store and solidifies her position. Then, Mr. Tenebris will surely hand over the leadership position.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_15.korean: 그러니 전 이리스 씨가 이번 백화점을 독차지해 입지를 확고히 했으면 좋겠습니다.&n그러면 테네브리스 씨도 순순히 리더의 자리를 물려주겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_150.english: I wanted to show… that I wasn't wrong…!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_150.korean: 내가 틀리지 않았다는 걸… 보여주고 싶었는데…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_151.english: Please evacuate to the power shelter! A gap will occur! Repeat—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_151.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 공백이 발생합니다! 반복합니다ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_156.english: It's okay, it's no big deal. … What about the others?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_157.english: All of our members are safe. For some reason, we have completely split off from the other side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_157.korean: 저희 멤버는 다들 무사합니다.&n무슨 우연인지 저쪽과는 완전히 갈라져 버렸습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_158.english: It seems like most of the Soul Junk have also swarmed toward Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_158.korean: 대부분의 소울정크도 테네브리스 쪽으로 몰려간 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_159.english: Ms. Iris, this is our chance! We've already packed plenty of supplies. Let's leave right now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_159.korean: 이리스 씨, 이건 기회입니다! 물자는 이미 충분히 챙겼습니다.&n이대로 바로 여길 떠나죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_16.english: Don't get the wrong idea. I have no intention of accepting the position that bastard hands down, nor do I intend to go back to Grass Blanket Camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_16.korean: 착각하지 마. 난 그 자식이 물려주는 자리를 받을 생각도, 잔디이불 캠프에 다시 들어갈 생각도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_160.english: What? What about the guys up there?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_161.english: Aren't they the ones who tried to kill us anyway? They might have intended to sacrifice us again this time!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_161.korean: 어차피 우리를 죽이려 했던 자들 아닙니까?&n이번에도 우리를 희생시킬 생각이었을지도 모릅니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_162.english: It must just be that some misunderstanding caused our positions to switch. Otherwise, we would have originally been the ones fighting Soul Junk over there.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_162.korean: 뭔가 착오가 생겨 입장이 바뀐 것뿐이겠죠.&n그렇지 않다면 저쪽에서 소울정크와 맞서고 있는 게 원래는 우리였을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_163.english: Hahaha! Serves you right! You brought it upon yourself!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_164.english: … That’s right… Heave-ho… Then, let’s hurry—

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_165.english: Ah, Iris. You dropped something. Is this… a teddy bear? … It's quite torn.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_165.korean: 아, 이리스 씨. 무언가 떨어뜨리셨습니다.&n이건… 곰인형? …상당히 찢어졌군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_17.english: … But if I were taking it by force in a legitimate way, that would be a different story.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_17.korean: …하지만 내가 정당하게 힘으로 빼앗는 거라면 얘기가 다르지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_171.english: Do you think I'm an adult?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_172.english: Of course! Isn't Ms. Iris someone who takes full responsibility for her decisions to the very end?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_172.korean: 그야 당연하죠!&n이리스 씨는 자신이 정한 일에 끝까지 책임을 지시는 분 아닙니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_173.english: I think he is much more mature than most adults!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_173.korean: 웬만한 어른 보다 훨씬 어른스럽다고 생각합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_175.english: In that case… it can’t be helped. I guess I’ll have to take responsibility like an adult.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_175.korean: 그렇다면… 어쩔 수 없지.&n어른답게, 책임을 져야겠네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_176.english: Mr. Tenebris! This is a big problem. The path down is completely blocked!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_176.korean: 테네브리스 씨! 큰일입니다.&n밑으로 내려가는 길이 완전히 막혔습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_177.english: Soul Junk keeps swarming in! That giant thing is completely impervious to attacks!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_177.korean: 소울정크가 계속 몰려오고 있어요! 저 거대한 녀석, 공격이 전혀 통하지 않습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_178.english: Everyone, step back! You must not fall!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_178.korean: 모두 제 뒤로 물러서세요! 떨어지면 안 됩니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_179.english: What happened to the collapsed floor?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_18.english: That's right! Exactly! That's exactly what I wanted to say!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_18.korean: 맞습니다! 바로 그거예요!&n제가 말씀드리고 싶은 게 딱 그겁니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_180.english: You're wrong! That side is completely blocked too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_182.english: I don't know! … Even if they are safe, they would have already run away! Because they are selfish guys!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_182.korean: 모르겠습니다! …무사하다 해도 이미 도망쳤을 겁니다!&n자기밖에 모르는 녀석들이니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_186.english: - The situation is the worst. That giant Soul Junk, in particular, has thick armor.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_186.korean: - 상황은 최악이다. 특히 저 거대한 소울정크는 장갑이 두터워.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_187.english: It's hard to cut through that armor with Tenebris's sword. Here, we need a powerful blow that can shatter it with a massive impact.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_187.korean: - 테네브리스의 검으로 저 장갑을 베어내긴 어려워. 여기서는 큰 충격으로 저 장갑을 부셔버릴 수 있는 강력한 한 방이 필요해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_188.english: However, the person who can pull that off here is…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_188.korean: - 하지만, 여기서 그걸 해낼 수 있는 사람은…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_19.english: Well, fine. Regardless of your opinion, there's no harm in looting the supplies anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_19.korean: 뭐, 좋아.&n네 생각이 어쨌든 어차피 물자를 털어서 나쁠 건 없으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_190.english: Step back! I need emergency treatment!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_191.english: Mr. Tenebris! We must get out of here first! We will all be wiped out here!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_191.korean: 테네브리스 씨! 일단 이곳을 벗어나야 합니다!&n여기선 전멸합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_198.english: I am the one who brought everyone here.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_199.english: As a leader, I will take responsibility... and bring everyone back safely.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_2.english: There are rumors circulating that another department store has appeared. Since no one has gone in yet, supplies must be plentiful.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_2.korean: 안 그래도 백화점이 또 하나 나타났다는 소문이 돌고 있습니다.&n아직 들어간 사람도 없으니 물자도 넉넉하겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_20.english: But… Tenebris must already know the news, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_20.korean: 그런데… 테네브리스는 이미 그 소식을 알고 있겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_200.english: I'm not sure if we're included in that 'all'.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_202.english: The self-proclaimed strongest Soulworker... is kneeling and bleeding? With that, do you have the right to talk about responsibility and justice?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_202.korean: 자칭 최강의 소울워커 님께서… 무릎 꿇고 피를 흘리고 있네?&n그래서야 책임이니 정의니 떠들 자격이 있겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_204.english: Why or not! I just came to exercise my responsibility!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_204.korean: 어째서고 뭐고! 나도 책임이란 걸 행사하러 왔을 뿐이야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_205.english: It's annoying that for some reason it seems like things are going according to his plan, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_205.korean: 웬지 그 녀석의 뜻대로 움직이는 것 같아 짜증나긴 하지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_206.english: This is just a temporary alliance this time! And just so you know, I haven't forgiven you yet, Tenebris!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_206.korean: 이번만 임시 동맹이야!&n참고로 난 아직 널 용서한 게 아니니까 테네브리스!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_208.english: You... don't get in the way... get out of here!!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_209.english: That's amazing. Soul Junk, who hadn't budged from any attack, has fallen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_209.korean: 굉장해요.&n어떤 공격에도 꿈쩍도 하지 않았던 소울정크가 쓰러졌어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_21.english: Given the scale, it must have been conveyed. But that indecisive person wouldn't move right away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_21.korean: 이 정도 규모면 전해졌을 겁니다.&n하지만 우유부단한 그 사람이 바로 움직일 리는 없겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_210.english: Alright, let's give it a try!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_22.english: Ms. Iris, shall we leave right away then?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_23.english: Yeah, gather the troops quickly. If we move now, we'll have the advantage.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_23.korean: 응, 인원을 빠르게 모아. 지금 움직이면 우리가 유리해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_25.english: I have absolutely no talent for fighting. It would be enough if you just included me in the group after you return.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_25.korean: 저는 싸움은 영 소질이 없어서요.&n다녀오신 뒤, 저를 그룹에 끼워만 주신다면 충분합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_26.english: If they want to join, I’ll let them in. I don’t turn away people who come.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_28.english: - Kent… I knew you were plotting something behind the scenes, but…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_28.korean: - 켄트… 뒤에서 뭔가를 꾸미고 있다는 건 알고 있었지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_29.english: I can't believe they would betray Tenebris so blatantly. What on earth is their goal?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_29.korean: - 이렇게 대놓고 테네브리스를 배신할 줄이야. 목적이 대체 뭐지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_3.english: Ah, right. Let's assume that's true for now. But why are they coming to tell us?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_3.korean: 아, 그래.&n우선 그 말이 사실이라 치자. 근데 그걸 왜 우리한테 와서 말하는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_30.english: Oh? So there was a cute little kid in a place like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_30.korean: 어라? 이런 곳에 귀여운 꼬마가 있었군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_31.english: Hmm... that's quite fascinating. It looks like a face I've seen somewhere before... It's like someone I know just got younger.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_31.korean: 흐음… 참 신기하군요.&n어디서 많이 본 얼굴인데… 마치 제가 아는 분이 어려진 것 같달까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_32.english: Kent. Stay away from that kid.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_33.english: If you lay even a hand on it, I won't let you get away with it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_35.english: Anyway… hmm… I see… I see.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_36.english: I never dreamed Yuma-san had this kind of taste—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_36.korean: 유마 씨가 이런 취향일 줄은 꿈에도ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_37.english: I don't mind at all if you pretend this never happened.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_37.korean: 지금 얘기 없었던 일로 해도 나는 전혀 상관없는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_38.english: Ahaha, that's scary. Then I'll take my leave.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_38.korean: 아하하, 무섭군요. 그럼 전 여기서 물러나겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_39.english: He's still a guy whose true intentions are impossible to read...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_39.korean: 여전히 속내를 알 수 없는 놈이야…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_4.english: If you're Tenebris's lackey, it would be perfect to just go and tell that guy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_4.korean: 테네브리스 따까리라면 그냥 그 자식한테 가서 말하면 딱 좋잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_40.english: ...So that's how it turned out. Little kid.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_41.english: Keep a close watch on this place while I'm gone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_41.korean: 내가 없는 동안 여기 잘 지키고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_42.english: Look at this! You were crying "Waaah!" the first time I saw you, and now you're acting all tough.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_42.korean: 요거 봐라?&n처음 봤을 때는 후에에엥~하고 울었던 주제에 늠름해진 척이나 하고 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_43.english: Hmph, I'm not afraid of anything. It's just that I'm worried about what to do when I see that guy's face again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_43.korean: 흥, 난 무서운 게 없거든.&n단지, 싫은 녀석의 면상을 다시 봤을 때 어떻게 해야 할지 고민이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_44.english: I’d love to smash my fist in that face, but!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_44.korean: 마음 같아서는 그 면상에 주먹을 박아버리고 싶지만!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_45.english: What's with the sudden change? How embarrassing...

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_46.english: Yeah, that's what I plan to do this time too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_47.english: I won't make the wrong choice again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_47.korean: 이젠 두 번 다시 틀린 선택을 하지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_50.english: - ...This should be fine. I don't get the feeling that Iris's mental state is under any pressure either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_50.korean: - ...이걸로 괜찮겠지. 이리스의 정신 상태도 몰려있다는 느낌은 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_51.english: But, Kent… it’s clear he’s plotting something.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_51.korean: - 하지만, 켄트… 녀석이 뭔가를 꾸미고 있는 건 분명해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_52.english: - Then… alright, let me join Shirayuri.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_54.english: I came to corner Yuma once again, but I didn't expect to find something so interesting.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_54.korean: 다시 한번 유마 씨를 몰아세우기 위해 찾아왔는데&n아주 흥미로운 걸 찾을 줄은 몰랐군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_57.english: As expected, you were aiming for this place too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_58.english: Why? Are you that upset that I came?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_58.korean: 왜? 내가 온 게 그렇게 언짢아? ?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_59.english: Aren't you disappointed that things went awry when you were planning to have it all to yourself?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_59.korean: 독차지할 생각이었는데 틀어져서 아쉬운 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_6.english: Well, you see, I haven't actually said anything, but I really haven't been happy with Mr. Tenebris's behavior lately.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_6.korean: 뭐, 그게 말이죠.&n사실 말은 안 했지만, 요즘 테네브리스 씨의 행동이 영 못마땅해서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_60.english: If you intend to fight, stop it. You can't beat me with your own strength.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_60.korean: 싸울 생각이라면 그만 둬.&n네 힘으로는 날 이길 수 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_61.english: If you attack us, I won't stay quiet anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_61.korean: 우리를 공격한다면 나도 더는 가만히 있지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_62.english: Ha! Here comes the great apostle of justice? You kept harping on about justice, justice, and now you're saying you'll just overpower them with force?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_62.korean: 하! 대단한 정의의 사도 납셨네?&n그렇게 정의, 정의 떠들더니 결국 힘으로 제압하겠다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_63.english: … There probably isn't any need for further conversation.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_64.english: Yeah, I have no intention of talking to you anymore, either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_64.korean: 그래, 나도 이제 너랑 말 섞을 생각 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_65.english: Both of you, stop! Do you intend to fight right here!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_65.korean: 두 분 다 멈추세요! 지금 여기서 싸울 생각이신가요!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_66.english: Get out of the way, Shirayuri. I haven't forgotten how hard you hit me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_66.korean: 비켜, 시라유리.&n네가 힘껏 때린 것도 아직 안 잊었다고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_67.english: Miss Iris, I know how you feel right now. But you can fight later. If you fight now, you will lose both supplies and people.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_67.korean: 이리스 양, 당신이 지금 어떤 기분인지는 알아요.&n하지만 싸우는 건 나중에도 할 수 있어요. 지금 싸우면 물자도, 사람도 모두 다 잃습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_68.english: How do you know how I feel—!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_7.english: After all that flirting all this time, you suddenly show up and expect me to believe it now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_7.korean: 지금껏 그렇게 꼬리쳐놓고 갑자기 찾아 와서는 그걸 지금 믿으라고?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_70.korean: 꼬맹이, 네가 여기에 왜 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_71.english: Where did the guy who confidently told me to leave it to him go, chasing me all the way here!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_71.korean: 자신 있게 맡겨달라던 녀석은 어딜 가고 여기까지 쫓아와!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_72.english: Hehe, since the child is saying all this... how about we let this pass peacefully just this once?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_72.korean: 후후, 아이가 이렇게까지 말하는데… 이번만은 평화롭게 넘어가면 어떨까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_73.english: Ah! Really! Alright! We can just let it slide this time!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_73.korean: 아아! 정말! 알았어! 이번엔 조용히 넘어가면 되잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_74.english: Hey kid! Go back and see! Stick right by my side and never let go!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_74.korean: 꼬맹이! 너 돌아가서 봐!&n내 옆에 딱 붙어서 절대 떨어지지 말고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_79.english: Fortunately, no fight broke out between Tenebris and Iris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_79.korean: - 다행히 테네브리스와 이리스 사이에 싸움은 벌어지지 않았다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_8.english: I thought Mr. Tenebris was ambitious.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_80.english: After agreeing to split the supplies in half, everyone went inside the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_80.korean: - 물자를 절반으로 나누어 가져가기로 약속한 뒤, 모두 백화점 안으로 들어갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_81.english: Ms. Iris! There is a box here too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_82.english: There is plenty of food and medicine left, too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_84.english: You never know. A Soul Junk might suddenly pop out like back then.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_84.korean: 그건 모르는 일이지. 그때처럼 갑자기 소울정크가 튀어나올지도 모르잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_85.english: As expected, you still have it in your heart.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_86.english: Do you know what kind of mess we went through because of that guy? It's no wonder we can't forget him!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_86.korean: 그 녀석 때문에 우리가 무슨 꼴을 당했는지 알아?&n잊지 못하는 게 당연하잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_87.english: Can't you trust Mr. Tenebris just a little?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_87.korean: 조금만 테네브리스 씨를 믿어주실 수는 없는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_89.english: Then, why don't you trust me?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_9.english: I thought I could gather Desire Walkers, increase the camp's power under the pretext of 'salvation,' and dominate the void.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_9.korean: 데자이어 워커를 모으고, '구원'을 명분으로 캠프의 전력을 늘려 공백을 지배할 줄 알았죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_90.english: What on earth is this nonsense? I'm talking about you... You haven't forgotten how hard you hit me with that hand, have you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_90.korean: 이건 또 무슨 소리래?&n너 말이야... 그 손으로 날 힘껏 때린 걸 잊은 건 아니지?
